body:
# ![createhardcore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e7c268b6791fdad6f7f7f13fe8f433f5c141cc4.jpeg)

## [Discord](https://discord.gg/eGxBgPg655) | [Instalation](https://createhardcore.azuriom.cloud/) | [FAQ](https://createhardcore.azuriom.cloud/faq)


CreateHardcore is a server modded in 1.20.1 that offers unique gameplay blending exploration, automation, survival and mutual aid.

You only have one life, so pay attention to everything!

A new way to reach the end with the end-remaster mod.

The dragon ender and the wither are also boosted for more epic battles!

So don't wait!! and join us on the createhardcore server!!!
